name: Creamy Hash Brown Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Condensed Cream of Celery Soup
4 cups Hash Brown Potatoes, Frozen Loose Pack
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the soup, milk, and cream cheese. Cook over medium heat until smooth.
2. Combine the potatoes and onions; stir in the soup mixture.
3. Pour into a 10x6x1 1/2 inch baking dish.
4. Cover with foil and bake at 350°F for 1 1/4 hours or until the potatoes are tender.
5. Remove the foil; top with shredded cheese.
6. Return to oven to melt the cheese.
